executives.name: Matthew Murphy
executives.background: Mr. Murphy has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer since July 2016 and as a director since July 2016. He was appointed Chairman of the Board in June 2021. Prior to joining Marvell, Mr. Murphy worked at Maxim Integrated, where he held several executive roles, including Executive Vice President, Business Units, Sales and Marketing.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, Chairman of the Board, Director, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Willem Meintjes
executives.background: Mr. Meintjes has served as our Chief Financial Officer since January 2023. He previously served as our Chief Accounting Officer from June 2016 to January 2023 and as our Treasurer from March 2018 to January 2023. Before joining Marvell, he was Vice President and Corporate Controller at Newport Corporation.

executives.name: Loi Nguyen
executives.background: Dr. Nguyen has served as our Executive Vice President, Optical and Copper Connectivity Group since April 2021. He co-founded Inphi Corporation and served as its Senior Vice President, Optical Interconnect from 2000 until its acquisition by Marvell in 2021.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Optical and Copper Connectivity Group

executives.name: Chris Koopmans
executives.background: Mr. Koopmans has served as our Chief Operations Officer since January 2023. He previously served as Executive Vice President, Marketing and Business Operations from 2020 to 2023 and as Executive Vice President, Networking and Processors from 2016 to 2020.

executives.name: Mitchell Gaynor
executives.background: Mr. Gaynor has served as our Chief Administration Officer since January 2023. He previously served as our Chief Legal Officer and Secretary from 2016 to 2023. Prior to Marvell, he was Executive Vice President and General Counsel at Juniper Networks.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Chief Administrative Officer, Chief Legal Officer, and Secretary

executives.name: Bethany Mayer
executives.background: Ms. Mayer has been a director since 2019. She was President and CEO of Ixia.

executives.name: Brad Buss
executives.background: Former CFO of SolarCity and Cypress Semiconductor. Director at Tesla and Advance Auto Parts.

executives.name: Dan Durn
executives.background: Mr. Durn has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since October 2021. Prior to joining Adobe, he was Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Applied Materials, Inc. from 2017 to 2021.

executives.name: Edward Frank
executives.background: Co-founder of Cloud Parity. Former Vice President of Macintosh Hardware Systems Engineering at Apple.

executives.name: Ford Tamer
executives.background: Former President and CEO of Inphi Corporation. Previously CEO of Telegent Systems and Senior Vice President at Broadcom.

executives.name: Jean Hu
executives.background: Ms. Hu is AMD’s Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer. She joined AMD in January 2023. Previously, she served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Marvell Technology, Inc. from 2016 to 2023. She also held senior financial leadership roles at Qlogic and Conexant Systems.

executives.name: Michael Strachan
executives.background: Former Partner at Ernst & Young LLP.

executives.name: Rebecca House
executives.background: Senior Vice President, Chief People and Legal Officer at Rockwell Automation.

executives.name: Rick Wallace
executives.background: Rick Wallace is the Chief Executive Officer of KLA Corporation. He has been with the company since 1988 and has held various leadership roles, including President and Chief Operating Officer. He was appointed CEO in 2006.

executives.name: Robert Switz
executives.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of ADC Telecommunications.

executives.name: Sara Andrews
executives.background: Chief Information Security Officer at Experian. Former CISO at PepsiCo and Unit 42 at Palo Alto Networks.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

board_of_directors.name: Matthew Murphy
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Marvell. Chairman of the Board since 2021.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, Chairman of the Board, Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
